diagrams.title: Hessian Matrix Structure
diagrams.description: General n×n Hessian showing all second partial derivatives arranged in matrix form
diagrams.purpose: Understanding matrix composition and symmetry property

diagrams.title: Classification of Critical Points
diagrams.description: Three scenarios at critical points: local minimum (bowl up), local maximum (bowl down), saddle point (mixed curvature)
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how Hessian curvature determines optimization outcomes

diagrams.title: Eigenvalue Tests for Definiteness
diagrams.description: Decision tree showing how eigenvalues determine matrix definiteness
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for classifying matrices using eigenvalues

diagrams.title: Principal Minor Test Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step procedure to check positive definiteness using determinants
diagrams.purpose: Systematic method for testing definiteness without computing eigenvalues
